data.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/pest-control/#content)

# pest-control

Pest Control Services

![Technician Providing Pest Control Services in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Interior-Pantry-Spraying-scaled-e1746211834244.jpg)

#### pest control

# Comprehensive General Pest Control Services

Your home or property deserves year-round protection from pests. At [Dang Pest Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/pest-control/),
we deliver general pest control services tailored to the unique challenges of the East Texas environment. Count on our team of skilled technicians to protect your home from unwanted invaders with precision and professionalism. We serve Tyler, TX, and the surrounding areas. Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Our Pest Control Process

## Step 1

## Phone Quoting Made Easy

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img1.png)

No inspection is required to get started. Our team will assess your needs by gathering essential details about your property—size, pest issues, and more—over the phone. Using this information, we’ll prepare a plan before even stepping onto your property.

## Step 2

## Thorough Initial Service

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img2.png)

## Interior & Exterior Inspection

Our technicians will conduct a comprehensive inspection of your property to identify pests, evidence of activity, entry points, and harborage areas.

## Targeted Treatments

We’ll provide both interior and exterior treatments to address pests already inside while preventing new ones from entering. This includes spraying in the kitchen, bathrooms, wall penetrations and selected interior areas as well as spraying exterior foundations, around windows and doors, and the eaves (up to 20 feet high).

## Pest Prevention

We treat up to 10 feet out from your foundation in addition to sweeping away spider webs, and treat entry points to fortify your property against a wide range of pests, including [cockroaches](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/roach-control/), [ants](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/ant-control/), [scorpions](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/scorpion-control/), [spiders](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/spider-control/), silverfish, centipedes, millipedes, and many more.

Note: Specialized treatment plans for pests like [bed bugs](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bed-bug-control/), [fleas and ticks](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/flea-tick-control/), [German cockroaches](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/roach-control/), and [termites](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/termite-inspections/) are available as stand-alone services.

## Step 3

## Custom Treatment Plan

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img3.png)

Based on our findings, we’ll discuss a detailed solution tailored to your situation. Our integrated pest management approach doesn’t just treat pests temporarily—it gets to the root of the problem to keep them away year-round.

## Step 4

## Monitoring & Preventative Care

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img4.png)

To ensure long-lasting protection, our team monitors your property regularly, adjusting treatments as needed to guarantee effectiveness.

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Why Choose Us?

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Proven-Results.png)

### Focused Expertise

We are proud members of the National Pest Management Association (NPMA) and the Texas Pest Control Association (TPCA), reflecting our commitment to industry best practices and professionalism.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Comprehensive.png)

### Environmentally Responsible

Our Integrated Pest Management (IPM) approach prioritizes environmentally protective solutions. We don’t just spray for a quick fix—we work to eliminate the root causes of your pest problems.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Safety.png)

### Proven Results

Our technicians leverage years of experience to deliver effective pest control with minimal disruption to your daily life. Whether it’s ants, spiders, cockroaches, or more unique pests, we’ve got the skills to handle the job.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Guarantee.png)

### Customer-Focused Service

From the moment you call until the final treatment, we’re dedicated to your satisfaction. Our knowledgeable team will walk you through each step of the process, ensuring your property is pest-free.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Custom-Plans.png)

### Local & Reliable

Based in Tyler, TX, Dang Pest Control proudly serves homeowners and property managers across Longview, Jacksonville, Lindale, Bullard, Whitehouse, and surrounding areas.

## Additional Services

While our general pest control treatments cover the most common pests in East Texas, we also provide specialized services, including:

- [Ant Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/ant-control/)
- [Spider Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/spider-control/)
- [Wasp & Hornet Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wasp-hornet-control/)
- [Scorpion Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/scorpion-control/)
- [Rodent Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/rodent-control/)
- [Mosquito Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/mosquito-control/)
- [Flea & Tick Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/flea-tick-control/)
- [Roach Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/roach-control/)
- [Bed Bug Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bed-bug-control/)
- [Termite Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/termite-control/)
- [Termite Inspections](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/termite-inspections/)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

![Exterior General Pest Control Services in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Exterior-Fence-scaled-e1746211948229.jpg)

![Cloud Image](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/Longview-r6hksnti0lrmf3nx6tj0qrq8bkbeoqwx1zrzvg77y8.png)

## Protect Your Property Today

Don’t wait for pests to invade your home—act now. With Dang Pest Control, you’ll enjoy expert service, tailored solutions, and peace of mind knowing your property is in good hands. Located in Tyler, TX, we proudly serve surrounding communities including [Longview](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/longview-tx/), [Jacksonville](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/jacksonville-tx/), [Lindale](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/lindale-tx/), [Bullard](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bullard-tx/), and [Whitehouse](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/whitehouse-tx/). Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)
